info.name: TML OEM API
info.description:
TML OEM API — end-to-end Postman collection.

Flow:
1. Generate Token → auto-saved to {{token}}
2. Order Creation → auto-saves first vehicle's {{tracking_id}}
3. Order Status (all vehicles)
4. SPOC Update
5. AIS140 Cert Request → creates AIS ticket(s)
6. Mining Cert Request → creates mining ticket(s)
7. AIS140 Ticket Status — all tickets by VIN (ticket_no: null)
8. AIS140 Ticket Status — single ticket by ticket_no
9. Mining Ticket Status — all tickets by VIN (ticket_no: null)
10. Mining Ticket Status — single ticket by ticket_no

Note: updated_at in Order Status is Unix epoch milliseconds (IST-based).

exec: if (tok) { pm.collectionVariables.set('token', tok); console.log('Token saved:', tok.substring(0,20) + '...'); }

request.description: Generates a Bearer token valid for 12 hours. Token is auto-saved to {{token}}.

Creates an order with 3 vehicles across 2 locations.
Response: array of { vin, order_tracking_id, ais140_ticket_no, mining_ticket_no } per vehicle.
The first vehicle's order_tracking_id is auto-saved to {{tracking_id}}.

Returns status for ALL vehicles in the order.
Pass any vehicle's order_tracking_id as trackingId.
updated_at is Unix epoch milliseconds (IST-based). Convert at epochconverter.com.

Updates or creates SPOC details for a vehicle's tracking_id.
Use the order_tracking_id from Order Creation response.

Creates AIS140 certification tickets.
VIN1 (valid) → returns new AIS-TKT-XXXXXXXXXX, saved to {{ais_ticket_no}}.
VIN2 (missing fields) → returns validation_errors.
Calling this again for the same VIN creates a NEW ticket (renewal support).

Creates mining certification tickets.
VIN1 (valid) → returns new MIN-TKT-XXXXXXXXXX, saved to {{min_ticket_no}}.
VIN2 (missing fields) → returns validation_errors.
Calling again for the same VIN creates a NEW ticket (renewal support).

item.name: 7. AIS140 Ticket Status — All by VIN

request.description:
ticket_no: null → returns ALL tickets for that VIN (newest first).
Useful to see all historical/renewal tickets for a vehicle.

item.name: 8. AIS140 Ticket Status — Single by ticket_no

request.description:
ticket_no provided → returns ONLY that specific ticket's info.
{{ais_ticket_no}} is auto-set when running request #5.

item.name: 9. Mining Ticket Status — All by VIN

request.description: ticket_no: null → returns ALL mining tickets for that VIN (newest first).

item.name: 10. Mining Ticket Status — Single by ticket_no

request.description:
ticket_no provided → returns ONLY that specific mining ticket.
{{min_ticket_no}} is auto-set when running request #6.
